text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Sübscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>avec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"Corrections made: 1) Fixed garbled unicode escape sequences (\\u221a\\u00a7 → ä, \\u221a\\u00bb → ü, \\u221a\\u00a9 → é, \\u221a\\u00fc → e, \\u221a\\u2020 → à, \\u221a\\u2264 → °) throughout the German/French text. 2) Fixed malformed tag <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> which appears to be a typo for \"avec fig.\" (with figures). 3) Fixed a period placement error \"dun Nouveau Supplement\" area - corrected spacing before period after AUTHOR tag. 4) Corrected mismatched closing tag <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE> to properly match its opening <PRICE> tag as <PRIZE> to maintain consistency with other price tags in the document. 5) Corrected the final mismatched tag <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE> - opening tag was PRIZE but closing was PRICE, standardized to PRIZE for consistency. 6) Fixed \"di\" to \"die\" (likely OCR error). All BIBL and nested tags (TITLE, VOLUME, FORMAT, YEAR, PRIZE, AUTHOR, PLACE) were verified for proper opening/closing pairs and appropriate nesting within the ITEM root element."}
